reports.title: CDC Current Situation: Andes virus outbreak on a cruise ship
reports.sourceName: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
reports.summary: CDC's May 12 current situation page says CDC is responding to the deadly Andes virus outbreak, no Andes virus cases have been confirmed in the United States as a result of the outbreak to date, and public risk remains extremely low.

reports.title: ECDC daily update: Andes hantavirus outbreak in cruise ship
reports.sourceName: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control
reports.summary: Official ECDC daily outbreak update used as the current canonical official count for the MV Hondius Andes virus event.

reports.title: WHO Disease Outbreak News: Andes hantavirus cluster linked to MV Hondius

locationMentions.name: MV Hondius travel route near Cabo Verde

reports.summary: WHO Disease Outbreak News update for the MV Hondius Andes virus cluster; retained as official count history.

reports.title: CDC HAN: Multinational outbreak of hantavirus disease on a cruise ship
reports.sourceName: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
reports.summary: CDC HAN advisory for U.S. clinicians and public-health partners about the MV Hondius Andes virus outbreak.

reports.title: ASPR repatriates U.S. citizens linked to MV Hondius response
reports.sourceName: Administration for Strategic Preparedness and Response
reports.summary: Federal repatriation and care coordination source for U.S. passengers linked to MV Hondius.

reports.title: RIVM current information: hantavirus on board Hondius is Andes virus
reports.summary: Dutch national public-health update confirming Andes virus on MV Hondius and emphasizing very small Netherlands spread risk.

reports.title: RIVM update: symptomatic contacts tested and monitored
reports.summary: RIVM reported three symptomatic people tested after aircraft contact with an infected person; two were negative and one was pending at the time.

reports.title: Nebraska Medicine monitoring for hantavirus
reports.summary: Health-system update for U.S. passengers monitored or treated at the Nebraska Medicine/UNMC special pathogens units.

reports.title: New Jersey Department of Health monitoring residents exposed during travel
reports.summary: State public-health monitoring update. These records represent exposed residents under monitoring, not confirmed New Jersey infections.

reports.title: NCDHHS aware of one North Carolina passenger linked to hantavirus outbreak
reports.sourceName: North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services
reports.summary: State health department update that one North Carolina passenger was evacuated to Nebraska for quarantine and that no current North Carolina cases were reported.

reports.title: Axios Atlanta: cruise passengers monitored at Emory
reports.summary: Supplemental local news signal for Atlanta/Emory monitoring connected to the MV Hondius event.

reports.title: CBS Atlanta: symptomatic cruise passenger at Emory tests negative
reports.summary: CBS Atlanta reported two exposed Georgia residents evaluated at Emory and a symptomatic passenger who tested negative for Andes virus according to HHS.

reports.title: Guardian: evacuated US and French MV Hondius passengers test positive
reports.summary: Supplemental international report on evacuated passengers; not treated as official count unless corroborated by public-health agencies.

reports.title: Reuters: passengers and crew begin evacuating from hantavirus-hit MV Hondius
reports.summary: Reuters-syndicated evacuation update used as supplemental response evidence, not a case count.

reports.title: ABC11 Raleigh-Durham: WHO screening process and U.S. state monitoring for MV Hondius
reports.summary: Supplemental ABC11 Raleigh-Durham live update describing WHO passenger screening and U.S. state monitoring. This is evidence of screening/monitoring activity, not a Raleigh case count.

reports.title: Associated Press: U.S. health officials trace passengers after first fatality
reports.summary: AP-syndicated report about passenger tracing and U.S. public-health follow-up; supplemental evidence only.

reports.title: New York Post: New York residents linked to deadly cruise outbreak
reports.summary: Supplemental New York media signal; Hantamap does not treat this as an official New York case count.

reports.title: Quad-County health officials confirm single case of hantavirus
reports.sourceName: Carson City Health and Human Services via Carson Now
reports.summary: Local health officials confirmed a single hantavirus case in Nevada's Quad-County region.

reports.title: KOLO: Quad-County officials confirm one hantavirus case
reports.summary: Supplemental local news report matching the Quad-County health official case announcement.

reports.title: CDC NNDSS weekly tables: Hantavirus Pulmonary Syndrome
reports.summary: Official U.S. surveillance evidence retained without inferred counts until NNDSS table extraction is verified.

reports.title: PHAC confirms positive hantavirus sample in Canadian MV Hondius passenger
reports.summary: PHAC confirmed one individual sample positive for hantavirus on May 16 and said general public risk in Canada from the MV Hondius-linked Andes hantavirus outbreak remains low.

reports.title: AP: Canadian national health agency confirms one positive hantavirus test
reports.summary: AP reported PHAC confirmed one of four Canadian MV Hondius passengers tested positive; the traveling partner was negative; both were a Yukon couple in a Victoria hospital. Event-wide deaths remain separate from Canada location markers.

reports.title: Reuters: WHO revises hantavirus cases lower after U.S. passenger tests negative
reports.summary: Reuters reported a WHO official said a previously inconclusive U.S. passenger was confirmed negative, lowering the global total to 10 from 11, while CDC said no confirmed U.S. cases and 41 people monitored.

reports.title: RIVM: Arrival and cleaning of cruise ship Hondius in Rotterdam
reports.summary: RIVM reported MV Hondius arrived in an enclosed Rotterdam port area with 27 people still on board for phased controlled disembarkation, health checks, cleaning, and disinfection.

reports.title: HuffPost Spain: Hondius arrives in Rotterdam for disinfection under strict sanitary measures
reports.summary: Supplemental Spanish report on Rotterdam arrival, testing/quarantine logistics, and disinfection. This is travel-linked logistics evidence, not a confirmed case report.

reports.title: The Sun: Hantavirus death in Colorado after officials confirm local case
reports.summary: Supplemental news evidence for the separate Douglas County, Colorado Sin Nombre hantavirus fatal case; official Douglas County/CDPHE source remains primary.
